name: Whipped Cream Frosting with Raspberry Sauce (for Decadenc
recipeInstructions:
Whipped Cream Frosting:
1. Whip the heavy whipping cream with powdered sugar and vanilla (or liqueur) until stiff peaks form.
2. Spread over the top of one layer cake.
Raspberry Sauce:
3. Thaw the frozen raspberries.
4. Cook the raspberries in a saucepan with cornstarch, stirring occasionally until thickened.
5. Chill the raspberry sauce.
6. Serve chilled alongside or on top of the cake with whipped cream frosting.
